title: Vengeance of the Three Musketeers
writer: Jean Bernard-Luc, Bernard Borderie, Alexandre Dumas
actors: Gérard Barray, Mylène Demongeot, Perrette Pradier
plot: To avenge her defeat and with the help of the Cardinal's army leader Rochefort, the treacherous Milady de Winter kidnaps both D'Artagnan and Constance, in order to spur a war between the French and the English, as per the Cardinal...
